name: Peanut Butter Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup smooth or chunky peanut butter
1 recipe French Vanilla Ice Cream Base
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt peanut butter over low heat.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Prepare the French Vanilla ice cream base.
4. Strain into a clean bowl.
5. Add the melted peanut butter and mix well.
6. Cool mixture thoroughly.
7. Transfer to an ice cream machine and freeze until firm.
Makes 1 quart.
